en: Can you understand fast conversations in English?
ko: 빠른 영어 대화를 이해할 수 있어? So what are you going to do
ja: 速い英語の会話を理解できる？
zhTW: 你能聽懂快速的英語對話嗎？
vi: Ban co the hieu hoi thoai tieng Anh nhanh khong?

en: So what are you going to do? So what are you going to do?
ko: 그래서 어떻게 할 거야? She's supposed to let me know
ja: それでどうするの？それでどうするの？
zhTW: 那你打算怎麼辦？那你打算怎麼辦？
vi: Vay ban dinh lam gi? Vay ban dinh lam gi?

en: She's supposed to let me know. She is supposed to let me know.
ko: 그녀가 나한테 알려줘야 해. 그녀가 나한테 알려줘야 해.
ja: 彼女が教えてくれるはずなの。彼女が教えてくれるはずなの。
zhTW: 她應該要通知我的。她應該要通知我的。
vi: Co ay phai cho toi biet. Co ay phai cho toi biet.

en: When did you buy this flat? When did you buy this flat?
ko: 이 집 언제 샀어? Well how'd you do
ja: このマンション、いつ買ったの？
zhTW: 你什麼時候買的這間公寓？
vi: Ban mua can ho nay khi nao? Ban mua can ho nay khi nao?

en: Well, how'd you do? Well, how did you do?
ja: で、どうだった？どうだった？
zhTW: 那你表現得怎樣？你表現得怎樣？
vi: The, ban lam the nao? Ban lam the nao?
